subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Commune intimately with God and His remembrance. Detach thyself from all that hath been created in the heavens and on the earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله ان استانس بالله و ذکره ثم انقطعی عما خلق فی السموات و الارضین
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayer for women, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
